hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | jq -e '.tool_input.run_in_background == true' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Background execution is disabled"}}' || echo '{}'

input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -n "$CCMIN_CWD" ] && [[ "$file_path" != "$CCMIN_CWD"* ]]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"File outside working directory. Only files under '$CCMIN_CWD' are allowed."}}'; else echo '{}'; fi
